title: Codex Hooks Config Schema
description: Schema for the generated plugins/<name>/hooks/codex-hooks.json — referenced by plugins/<name>/.codex-plugin/plugin.json's 'hooks' field (R20).
$comment: Repo-derived schema, not an official OpenAI schema. Not independently spiked: docs/research/2026-07-16-codex-plugin-contract-spike.md finding (d) confirms the manifest's 'hooks' string-path pointer is accepted by the parser, but hook execution itself is currently inert (plugin_hooks feature 'removed' on codex-cli 0.144.1), so this file's internal shape has never been exercised by a live Codex session. This schema mirrors this repo's existing Claude hooks shape (schemas/plugin.schema.json's inlineHooks definition: an object keyed by event name, each value an array of {matcher, hooks: [{type, command}]}) as the most defensible provisional port, pending upstream restoring plugin_hooks — re-verify and correct when that happens.
